title: Telemetry.SanityBudgetSummary.v1
description: Per-resurrection-run summary of sanity band occupancy and transitions, derived from H.PlayerEnvelope.FPS telemetry.

summaryId.description: Unique identifier for this summary record.

runId.description: Resurrection run identifier this summary corresponds to.

sessionId.description: Gameplay session identifier, for joining with other telemetry streams.

sessionDurationSeconds.description: Actual duration T of the run, in seconds.

sanityBandPolicyId.description: ID of the SanityBandPolicy.FPS.v1 contract used to compute bands for this summary.

timeLowBandSeconds.description: Total time in seconds spent with sanity below the comfort band: T_low.

longestLowBandRunSeconds.description: Duration in seconds of the longest contiguous interval in low band: L_low.

timeHighBandSeconds.description: Total time in seconds spent with sanity above the high-band threshold: T_high.

bandTransitionCount.description: Number of times sanity crossed between low/comfort/high bands during this run.
